place: Bophut, Ko Samui District, Surat Thani, Thailand
title: Hillside Oceanview Pool Villa - Bophut
note: Fully staffed · chef on request · + tax & service
blurb: A serene hillside villa of around 640 m² in a managed beachfront residence estate at Bophut, with an elevated ocean view and a sea-facing 12-metre infinity pool. Just 100 metres from Bophut Beach and a six-minute drive to Fisherman’s Village. Designed over three levels with a top-floor master suite, and an optional private chef.
detail:
Discover a serene hillside sanctuary in a managed beachfront residence estate at Bophut — a private hillside villa with an elevated ocean view, designed over three levels and accommodating up to eight guests.

The focal point is the large air-conditioned living and dining room, whose floor-to-ceiling doors slide open to a sea-facing 12-metre infinity pool. An outdoor terrace with daybeds and umbrellas invites you to relax in the sunshine or take a refreshing dip. The kitchen is fully equipped with cookware and appliances and a central island that doubles as a breakfast bar, while high-quality furnishings, neutral tones, colourful modern artwork and natural materials create a calm and stylish environment.

The largest bedroom takes pride of place on the top floor, with a king bed, dressing area and a spacious en-suite featuring a sunken bathtub, shower area and its own balcony; the other bedrooms are airy spaces furnished with teakwood pieces and artefacts. The villa is just a six-minute drive to Fisherman’s Village and a three-minute walk to Bophut Beach. The shoreline directly in front of the estate is rocky; a short 200-metre stroll along the coast brings you to a swimmable stretch of beach. Fully staffed, with an optional private chef and kayaks, yoga mats and a BBQ on request.

features.l: Kayaks · yoga mats · BBQ on request
100 m to Bophut Beach · 6 min to Fisherman’s Village
